items.title: Sooryavanshi wins Orange Cap, MVP and Emerging Player awards in IPL 2026
items.summary: The 15-year-old batter was the first to win both the MVP and Emerging Player awards in the same season
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Man City's future looks bright - and Shaw's role is key
items.summary: Manchester City's domestic double is the start of what they hope will be a hugely successful period for the club - and Khadija Shaw is at the centre of it.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: With this RCB group, you don’t need to be the one to step up every time: Kohli
items.summary: We've had to wait for so long and then just to have a group of guys where you feel like you're stepping onto the ground, you don't need to be the one to step up every time, says...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
